name: Add resource file
description: Adds or replaces one raw APK file from text options.

name: Alert Distances
description:
Configures radar/camera and hazard alert announcement distances.
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.

name: AutoZoom
description:
Controls how aggressively the map zooms in/out based on driving speed.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod

options.title: Speed factor
options.description: Higher = more zoom-out at speed. Official: 10.

options.title: Gradient speed threshold (km/h)
options.description: Zoom gradient activates above this speed. Official: 30.

name: Bypass License Check
description: Bypasses PairIP DRM license verification to prevent forced app shutdown on non-Play-licensed installs.

name: Bypass Subscription Paywall
description: Bypasses the subscription paywall in-app.

name: Change package name
description: Changes manifest package and optionally provider/permission authorities.

name: Change version code
description: Changes android:versionCode.

options.title: Version code
options.description: Version code to write into AndroidManifest.xml.

name: Custom certificates
description: Adds a permissive network security config with system/user certs.

name: Dark mode
description: Force dark mode for Amazon Shopping.

name: Disable ad SDK calls
description: No-ops common ad SDK load/show/init/fetch methods in bundled ad packages.

name: Disable Ads
description: Prevents the AppOpen ad preloader from initialising.

name: Disable Ads
description:
Suppresses all Waze ad systems via bundled preferences file:
• AdMob SDK (Ad_.*)
• Google Ads (Google_Ads.*)
• Ads Inventory Prediction
• ExternalPOI pins, coupons, popups (ExternalPO_ + Extern__POI both key variants)
• Search autocomplete server ads
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (ExternalPOI keys), Waze Chuppito (dual-key coverage).

name: Disable Advil Ad Requests
description: Stubs AdvilRequest.getPageUrl() → "" so the Advil ad server receives no page URL and returns no ad content.

name: Disable Analytics / Telemetry
description: Disables App Analytics / Telemetry.

name: Disable clipboard access
description: Blocks app clipboard reads and writes.

name: Disable Play Integrity
description: Blocks Play Integrity service binding.

name: Disable search suggestions tracking
description: Prevents search keypress and focus events from being sent with suggestion requests.

name: Disable shake ads
description: Skips SensorManager.registerListener calls that can power shake-to-ad behavior.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables CamScanner's custom telemetry/log-agent system.

name: Disable Tracking
description: Disables analytics and telemetry in ES File Explorer

name: Disable video autoplay
description: Prevents product and ad videos from autoplaying.

name: Enable Android debugging
description: Sets android:debuggable=true.

name: Enable debug build target
description: Forces compatible BUILD_TARGET debug providers to debug=true.

name: Enable Debug Menu
description: Enables Duolingo's hidden debug menu in settings.

name: Enable ROM signature spoofing
description: Adds fake-signature permission and metadata.

name: Enlarged Speedometer
description: Increases speedometer digit size for better readability.

options.title: Text size — speed below 100
options.description: Speedometer font size when speed < 100. Default: 28sp (original: 20sp).

options.title: Text size — speed 100+
options.description: Speedometer font size when speed ≥ 100. Default: 21sp (original: 13sp).

name: Export all activities
description: Makes all activities exportable.

name: Export internal data documents provider
description: Registers an extension DocumentsProvider for the app internal data directory.

name: Fix Amazon manifest conflicts
description: Updates shared Amazon permissions so other Amazon apps can coexist.

name: Fix Firebase after re-signing
description:
Fixes Firebase services (push notifications, Remote Config, Firebase Auth) that break after Morphe re-signs the app with a different certificate.

Apply with Original app certificate patch no other config needed.

name: Force dark theme
description: Forces common AppCompat, UiModeManager, and Configuration dark-mode checks to night mode.

name: GmsCore support (MicroG)
description:
Routes Google Play Services calls through MicroG instead of real GPS.

Works for: Google apps (YouTube, Maps, News, Photos) and third-party apps using classic Google Sign-In (Android 13 and below).

Does not work for: Android 14+ Credential Manager sign-in (most modern third-party apps), Play Integrity / SafetyNet checks, or apps with custom auth.

Requires MicroG RE installed. Apply with Original app certificate patch.

options.title: MicroG package name
options.description: Which MicroG / GmsCore app is installed on your device. Check your device's app list for "MicroG" or "GmsCore" if unsure — most users should leave this as the default.

options.title: Main activity class (optional)
options.description: The app's main Activity class name ending with a semicolon, e.g. /MainActivity; Used to inject the MicroG check at startup. Leave blank for auto-detection.

options.title: Custom package name (optional)
options.description: Rename the app to this package name. Leave blank to keep the original. Must be a valid package name (e.g. com.example.myapp).

name: Hex patch
description: Replaces one hex byte pattern inside one APK file.

name: Hide ADB status
description: Hides adb_enabled and development_settings_enabled.

name: Hide app icon
description: Removes launcher category from MAIN launcher filters.

name: Hide mock location
description: Hides mock-location signals from app checks.

options.title: Provider
options.description: Provider returned when app reads an unknown/mock provider.

name: Hide Rufus tab
description: Removes the Rufus AI assistant tab from Amazon's bottom navigation bar.

name: Hide VPN and proxy
description: Hides common VPN transport/interface and Java proxy property checks.

name: Map Skin (Vitamin C)
description:
Applies Chuppito's 'Vitamin C' map skin. All visual values configurable.
• Night: true black AMOLED background (saves battery, prevents burn-in)
• Day: warm beige background
• Larger font labels across the board
• Wider navigation arrow head for better visibility
• Custom car 3D models: Batmobile, Riddler, race car, 3D arrow
Credits: ALEX02-GTT (skin design), Waze Chuppito Mod (integration).

options.title: Day background color (hex)
options.description: Default: ebe7dd (warm beige). Original Waze: f7f3eb.

name: Navigation & Map
description:
Configures navigation and map behaviour:
• Nearing destination distance (Credits: CGE Mod)
• Android Auto head-up alert distances
• Map turn mode (auto-zoom to upcoming turn)
• Traffic bar minimum time threshold
• GPS icon visibility
• Route notifications (hazard, school zone) both disabled by default
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (nearing destination), Waze Chuppito (remaining keys).

options.title: Traffic bar min time in traffic (seconds)

name: Open links in browser
description: Opens non-Amazon URLs in the default browser instead of the in-app WebView.

name: Override certificate pinning
description: Forces network security config trust anchors to override pins.

name: Popup Suppression
description:
Prevents promotional and ad popups from appearing while driving.
Raises the minimum trigger speed to a near-impossible value so popups never appear.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod.

options.title: Min reset scroll speed (MMSec)
options.description: Speed at which scroll suppression resets. Official: 1400.

options.title: Delay after user interaction (seconds)
options.description: Seconds before popup can appear post-interaction. Official: 0.

name: Predictive back gesture
description: Enables Android predictive back gesture.

name: Price history charts
description: Injects Keepa and CamelCamelCamel price history charts on Amazon product pages.

name: Provide Original app certificate
description: By Default it Reads the signing certificate from the original app installed. Required for GmsCore, Firebase, and Signature spoof patches. Only fill options below if the original is uninstalled.

options.title: Path to original APK (if uninstalled)
options.description: Full path to the original APK or .apks bundle. Example: /sdcard/Download/Waze.apks

options.title: Certificate SHA-1 (manual)
options.description: 40-char hex. Found on APKMirror under app signature info.

options.title: Certificate Base64 DER (manual)
options.description: Needed only for Signature spoof patch. Get it with: apksigner verify --print-certs original.apk

name: Radar Sound (Any Speed)
description: Plays radar/speed camera sound alerts regardless of current speed. Official Waze only alerts when over the speed limit.

name: Remove ad manifest entries
description: Removes common ad SDK permissions, services, providers, libraries, and metadata.

name: Remove ADS
description: Remove in-app ads

name: Remove Ads
description: Removes interstitial and exit native ads from m-Indicator.

name: Remove Ads
description: Remove in-app ads.

name: Remove ads
description: Stubs all ad loading paths: banner/interstitial loaders, billing callbacks, and ad SDK init.

name: Remove ads
description: Hides sponsored and ad content in Amazon Shopping via CSS injection.

name: Remove ads
description: Disables Block Puzzle AdMob initialization, banner, and interstitial ads.

name: Remove ads
description: Disables interstitial/banner ad loaders, hides promoted listings and profiles from search feeds.

name: Remove ads
description: Disables LiveScore banner, native, and interstitial ad requests.

name: Remove Ads / Unlock Premium
description: Forces SubscriptionStateImpl.getStatus() (LB2/c.h) to always return HAS_UNLIMITED_SUBSCRIPTION and getPurchase() (LB2/c.g) to return a well-formed fake Purchase, removing ads and the upgrade button/banner without crashing on the now-expected non-null Purchase object.

name: Remove audio capture policy
description: Forces runtime audio capture policy to ALLOW_CAPTURE_BY_ALL.

name: Remove Item Limits
description: Removes all  item limits in-app.

name: Remove screen capture restriction
description: Allows audio playback capture in the manifest.

name: Remove screenshot restriction
description: Removes FLAG_SECURE and screenshot blocking.

name: Remove share targets
description: Removes chooser/direct share targets.

name: Remove Watermark
description: Removes watermarks from Canva exports and previews.

name: Report Speed Limit
description: Adds a Report option when tapping the speedometer to report wrong or missing speed limits. Not available in the official version.

name: Sanitize share links
description: Strips tracking parameters from copied/shared Amazon links, leaving only the clean product URL.

name: Set target SDK 34
description: Sets targetSdkVersion to 34.

name: Speed Limit Sign
description: Sets the speed limit sign style shown on the map.

options.title: Sign style
options.description: us = large circular US-style (recommended). metric = small local-style.

name: Spoof Android ID
description: Spoofs Settings.Secure android_id reads.

name: Spoof app signature
description:
Makes the app think its signing certificate is unchanged after Morphe re-signs it.

Useful when an app crashes or shows a tamper warning because it checks its own certificate.

Does not bypass Play Integrity / SafetyNet hardware attestation.

Apply with Original app certificate patch.

options.title: Package name override (optional)
options.description: Leave blank — read automatically from the app. Only set this if you changed the app's package name and the patch is using the wrong one.

name: Spoof Bluetooth identifiers
description: Spoofs Bluetooth adapter name and MAC address reads.

name: Spoof build info
description: Spoofs common android.os.Build fields with configurable values.

name: Spoof install source
description:
Makes the app think it was installed from a specific store (default: Google Play).

Useful when an app blocks features or shows errors because it detects it was not installed from the Play Store.

Only affects what the app itself sees - does not change the real system install record.

options.title: Store to impersonate
options.description: Most apps only check for the Google Play Store, so the default is usually correct. Pick from the list, or type any package name directly if your app checks for a different store.

name: Spoof keystore security level
description: Forces key/security level getters to software/trusted-environment style values.

name: Spoof Pixel device
description: Ports PixelSpoof-style Build, system property, and Pixel feature spoofing.

options.title: Spoof mode
options.description: Pixel 10 Pro XL / mustang profile, or Pixel XL / marlin for Google Photos.

name: Spoof Play age signals
description: Spoofs Play age signal result getters.

name: Spoof root of trust
description: Spoofs common RootOfTrust verified boot getters.

name: Spoof SIM provider
description: Spoofs TelephonyManager SIM/network provider values.

name: Spoof telephony IDs
description: Spoofs IMEI, MEID, subscriber ID, SIM serial, and line number reads.

name: Spoof WARP+ Unlimited UI
description: Unlocks WARP+ UI locally.

name: Spoof Wi-Fi connection
description: Forces common connectivity checks to connected/unmetered.

name: Spoof Wi-Fi identifiers
description: Spoofs Wi-Fi SSID, BSSID, and MAC address reads.

name: Spoof Widevine / DRM level
description:
Reports Widevine L1 (hardware DRM) to apps that check DRM level locally.

Useful for apps that refuse to play HD/4K content on L3 devices or after re-signing.

Does not bypass server-side DRM - Netflix, Disney+ and similar are not affected.

options.title: Widevine security level to report
options.description: L1 = hardware DRM (highest quality). L3 = software only. Default L1.

options.title: HDCP level to report
options.description: HDCP_V2_2 is required for 4K content on most streaming apps.

name: Suppress Paywall
description: Suppresses the in-app paywall.

name: Suppress Premium Promotions
description: Supress all premium promotions in-app.

name: Uncensored Radar / Camera Display
description:
Shows exact fixed and mobile speed camera locations, including those not yet in the official Waze radar zone. Enables enforcement alerts via preferences keys:
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.
